design_philosophy: Modern hospital management dashboard designed for calm, trust, and operational efficiency. Moving away from sterile, cold 'hospital blue' to a warmer, grounded aesthetic. Relies on solid surfaces, clear typography, and structured F-pattern layouts rather than glass or excessive gradients to prevent visual fatigue.

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-stone-900

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-stone-200 bg-white h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 flex flex-col

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-emerald-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors hover:bg-emerald-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-stone-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-stone-700 transition-colors hover:bg-stone-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-stone-500 focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.destructive: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-rose-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors hover:bg-rose-700

cards.stat_card: flex flex-col rounded-xl border border-stone-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md

tables.container: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-stone-200 bg-white shadow-sm
tables.header: bg-stone-50 border-b border-stone-200 text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-500

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-stone-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-stone-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='add-patient-modal-trigger')

login_background.description: Modern waiting room with chairs. Use as the background image for the Admin Login split-screen layout.

dashboard_welcome_graphic.description: Female doctor discusses health chart with patient. Can be used in an empty state or a welcome banner in the dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Light theme with Organic & Earthy archetype (Stone and Emerald palette). Do NOT use dark mode, neon, or stark 'hospital blue'.
For the dashboard, use the 'Control Room' grid setup. Stat cards should stretch correctly. Use flat surfaces with a 1px border-stone-200 and shadow-sm. Avoid glassmorphism.
Data Tables are critical: Use Shadcn UI tables. Add clear status badges (Scheduled=Amber, Completed=Emerald, Cancelled=Rose) with appropriate background and text colors.
All forms (Add Doctor, Add Patient, Book Appointment) must use Shadcn Dialog/Modals or dedicated pages with Shadcn form components and validation.
Implement Sonner for toast notifications (e.g., Appointment booked, SMS sent).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Implement a responsive sidebar layout. On mobile, it should collapse into a hamburger menu (Sheet component).
Ensure high contrast and readability. Text should be primarily text-stone-900 on bg-stone-50 or bg-white.
CRITICAL: The tech stack uses standard JavaScript (.js / .jsx), NOT TypeScript (.tsx / .ts). Configure shadcn/ui and all components to use pure JS and prop-types instead of TS interfaces.
For icons, utilize lucide-react as standard.
